title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
